# Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci/build/chore

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `make docs-version-check` when `Cargo.toml` version changed
- [ ] `make man` when `docs/man/*.md` changed

## Notes

Mention any profile, group, symlink, security, installer, or release behavior that reviewers should check manually.
